subject: refactor(extract): split MediaTab, ContentTab into sub-components + platform search
body:
Extract sub-components from 2 oversized files and add platform picker search.

MediaTab.jsx (1397 → 882 lines):
- Extracted AIPromptHelper.jsx (266 lines) — AI image prompt builder UI
- Extracted SampleImagesSection.jsx (266 lines) — CDN sample image gallery

ContentTab.jsx (915 → 419 lines):
- Extracted TextStyleControls.jsx (172 lines) — size/bold/italic/spacing toolbar
- Extracted FreeformEditor.jsx (341 lines) — FreeformBlockEditor + FreeformCellEditor

App.jsx layout extraction (partial):
- Created ReaderMode.jsx, MobileLayout.jsx, DesktopLayout.jsx files
- Not yet wired in — render branches still inline (tracked in TODO)
- Imports commented with KEEP marker for future use

PlatformPreview.jsx — search filter:
- Added text search input to platform selector
- Filters by platform group name or format name
- Auto-expands matching categories when searching
- Addresses "Platform picker modal redesign" TODO partially
